db.title: Database
db.restoreTooLargeClient: The selected SQL dump is larger than {size}.
db.confirmRestore: This will overwrite the entire database. Continue?

users.title: Users
users.createDesc: Creates a full-access root admin. Only add people you trust with users, settings, uploads, and backups.
users.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The user's sessions will be terminated immediately.
users.usernameFormat: Letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only

categories.title: Categories
categories.label: Name
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? This cannot be undone.
categories.deleteAliasConfirm: Delete this alias? Shared links using this alias will stop working.

tags.title: Tags
tags.name: Name
tags.deleteConfirm: Delete this tag? This cannot be undone.

upload.noTopicsDescription: Photos need a category before they can be uploaded.
upload.limitExceeded: Upload limit exceeded. Add at most {maxFiles} files, {maxFileSize} per file, and {maxSize} per upload window.
upload.limitHint: Up to {maxFiles} files, {maxFileSize} per file, and {maxSize} per upload window.

imageManager.title: Title
imageManager.deleteImageConfirmDesc: The image and all its files will be permanently deleted.
imageManager.deleteCleanupWarning: Deleted, but {count} file cleanup steps failed. Check server logs.
imageManager.copyFailed: Group link created, but copying it failed on this browser.
imageManager.bulkDeleteCleanupWarning: Deleted database records, but {count} file cleanup steps failed. Check server logs.

home.loadMoreRateLimited: Too many load requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
home.loadMoreMaintenance: Gallery is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Try again shortly.

login.title: Admin
login.description: Sign in to manage your gallery

viewer.copyFailed: Share link created, but copying it failed on this browser.
viewer.shortcutsHint: Shortcuts: ←/→ to navigate, F to toggle lightbox.

shared.ogNotFoundDescription: This shared photo could not be found.

search.hint: Search by title, tag, camera, or description
search.rateLimited: Too many searches. Please wait a moment and try again.
search.maintenance: Search is temporarily unavailable during maintenance.
search.invalid: Type at least 2 characters to search.

sharedGroup.title: Shared Photos
sharedGroup.notFoundDescription: This shared collection could not be found.

seo.title: SEO Settings
seo.generalDesc: Site title and description for search engines and social media previews.
seo.siteTitleHint: Used in <title> tags and Open Graph. Leave empty for default.
seo.navTitleHint: Short title shown in the navigation bar. Leave empty for default.
seo.siteDescriptionHint: Used in meta description and Open Graph. Leave empty for default.
seo.author: Author
seo.authorHint: Used in Open Graph and JSON-LD. Leave empty for default.
seo.localeHint: Open Graph locale code (e.g. en_US, ko_KR). Leave empty for default.
seo.ogDesc: Default image for social media link previews. Individual photo pages use the photo itself.
seo.ogImageUrlHint: Same-origin URL or path. Individual photo and share pages use the photo itself.
seo.loadFailed: Could not load SEO settings. Please try again before saving changes.

serverActions.invalidTagName: Tag names must be 1-100 characters and cannot contain commas

serverActions.tooManyTags: Too many tags in a single update (max 100 each)

serverActions.invalidUsernameFormat: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

serverActions.invalidTagNames: Tag names must be 1-100 characters and cannot contain commas
serverActions.cumulativeUploadSizeExceeded: Cumulative upload size exceeds limit per hour

serverActions.tooManyShareRequests: Too many share link requests. Please try again later.
serverActions.imagesMustBeProcessed: All selected images must finish processing before sharing
serverActions.imagesNotFound: One or more selected images could not be found
serverActions.noActiveShareLink: Image does not have an active share link
serverActions.topicImageProcessingWarning: The category was saved, but the image could not be processed.
serverActions.restoreInProgress: Another restore is already in progress
serverActions.tagSlugCollision: Tag "{newName}" was mapped to existing "{existingName}" (same slug)

serverActions.seoDescriptionInvalid: Site description contains disallowed formatting characters. Remove invisible or right-to-left characters.

serverActions.seoNavTitleInvalid: Navigation title contains disallowed formatting characters. Remove invisible or right-to-left characters.

serverActions.seoAuthorInvalid: Author name contains disallowed formatting characters. Remove invisible or right-to-left characters.

serverActions.seoOgImageUrlTooLong: OG image URL is too long (max 500 characters)
serverActions.seoOgImageUrlInvalid: OG image URL must be a relative path or a same-origin http(s) URL
serverActions.imageSizesLocked: Output sizes are locked once photos exist. Regenerate the library to change them.
serverActions.uploadSettingsLocked: Upload-processing settings are locked while uploads are active or after photos exist. Regenerate the library to change them.
serverActions.tagPersistenceWarning: Uploaded {file}, but one or more requested tags could not be saved.

photo.notFoundDescription: This photo could not be found.

topic.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist.

error.title: Error
error.description: Something went wrong loading this page.
error.adminDescription: Something went wrong in the admin panel.

settings.title: Settings
settings.imageProcessingDesc: Configure image quality and output sizes.
settings.imageSizesHint: Comma-separated pixel widths (e.g. 640,1536,2048,4096). Auto-sorted and deduped, max 8, locked once photos exist.
settings.privacyDesc: Choose what metadata to keep on upload.
settings.stripGps: Do Not Store GPS Coordinates on Upload
settings.stripGpsHint: New uploads won't store GPS in gallery metadata. Existing images and source EXIF aren't touched.
settings.loadFailed: Could not load settings. Please try again before saving changes.
settings.imageSizesLockedHint: Output sizes are locked because photos already exist. Empty the gallery to change them.
settings.uploadContractLocked: Image size and GPS settings are write-once for an existing gallery, so old and new uploads stay consistent.
